info.description: This is simple REST API for a UK train data.
info.title: Train API

get.description: Responds with a list of all customers

post.description: Creates a new customer with the provided details

get.description: Responds with a customer and their details
Responds with all applications for a given customer

post.description: Approves an application so an API key can be generated
Returns a JWT (Json Web Token) which will expire in 24 hours

get.description: Fetches application details for the authenticated customer

delete.description: Deletes an application for the authenticated customer

post.description: Refreshes the API key associated with an application

get.description: Returns all customer data including applications
Fetches all application details for the authenticated customer

post.description: Creates a new application for the authenticated customer

get.description: Check if the service is active

post.description: Returns a JWT (Json Web Token) which will expire in 24 hours

put.description: Updates existing password with new one after verifying the current password

delete.description: Resets password given a user's email address

post.description: Generates a read-only SQL query from a natural language prompt, executes it, then returns a summary
Returns a JWT (Json Web Token) which will expire in 24 hours

get.description: Responds with all stations, or the first 5 matches when using the optional search query

parameters.description: Search term matching station name or TIPLOC
parameters.name: search

get.description: Responds with a single station in the database
Responds with station analysis data for the station matching the provided TIPLOC
Responds with a GeoJSON representing station locations as features

AdministrationBearerAuthorisation.description: JWT (JSON Web Token) access token using Bearer scheme, for administration routes. Requires the "type" claim to be "administrator".
AdministrationBearerAuthorisation.name: Authorization

ApplicationKeyBearerAuthorisation.description: Application key credentials in Bearer format where token is base64(applicationId:applicationKey).
ApplicationKeyBearerAuthorisation.name: Authorization

ProtectedBearerAuthorisation.description: JWT (JSON Web Token) access token using Bearer scheme, for protected routes.
ProtectedBearerAuthorisation.name: Authorization
